heart_line.long_straight: Emotional stability and a thoughtful approach to love.
heart_line.short: Pragmatic and reserved in emotional matters.
heart_line.faded: A period of emotional reflection and inward growth.

head_line.long: An analytical mind with deep concentration.
head_line.sloped: Highly imaginative and artistic approach to logic.

life_line.long_clear: Strong vitality and a grounded lifestyle.
life_line.short_clear: A focused life energy with efficient use of time.
life_line.chained: A variety of life experiences contributing to wisdom.

disclaimer: For entertainment and lifestyle insight only. These interpretations are based on traditional cultural themes and are not deterministic.
